analysis.summary_en: TAIEX up 0.73% in a risk-on session, but leadership is narrow and asymmetric: MediaTek (2454) limit-up +9.81% on Marvell/Google TPU supply chain news, Hon Hai (2317) +4.74%, and UMC (2303) +3.15% on memory/foundry price hike read-through. TSMC (2330) flat locally despite TSM ADR +1.79% overnight — a notable 1.79% divergence suggesting local underperformance or catch-up on the next session. Weakness concentrated in Largan (3008) -2.27% and ASE (3711) -1.48%. Theme of the day: AI ASIC supply chain + DRAM pricing tailwind; laggard risk is TSMC catch-up.
analysis.summary_zh: 台股上漲0.73%,風險偏好但領漲個股集中:聯發科(2454)因Marvell/Google TPU供應鏈消息漲停+9.81%,鴻海(2317)+4.74%,聯電(2303)+3.15%反映記憶體/晶圓代工漲價題材。台積電(2330)本地收平,但TSM ADR昨夜+1.79%,出現1.79%背離,暗示台積電明日有補漲空間。大立光(3008)-2.27%、日月光(3711)-1.48%為弱勢。主軸為AI ASIC供應鏈+DRAM漲價;關注台積電補漲。

key_stories.headline_en: MediaTek to supply Marvell's next three generations of Google TPUs
key_stories.headline_zh: 聯發科將供應Marvell為Google開發的未來三代TPU ASIC
key_stories.analysis_en: MediaTek +9.81% (limit-up) on DigiTimes report that MediaTek remains entrenched in Google's TPU supply chain across multiple generations alongside Broadcom, with Marvell entering as a third ASIC partner. This is a multi-year revenue visibility story for MediaTek's ASIC/custom silicon division, which had been a swing factor in bull/bear debates. Limit-up move is aggressive but the structural read is justified — Google TPU volume growth is one of the most durable AI capex lines. Watch for follow-through tomorrow; limit-up often sees profit-taking on day 2.
key_stories.analysis_zh: 聯發科漲停+9.81%,因DigiTimes報導聯發科在Google TPU供應鏈中的地位穩固,與Broadcom並列,Marvell為第三家ASIC夥伴。此為多年營收能見度題材,ASIC/客製晶片部門過去是多空分歧點,今日消息具結構性利多。漲停幅度積極但方向合理 — Google TPU出貨成長是AI資本支出中最具持續性的題材之一。需留意明日漲停後的獲利了結壓力。

key_stories.headline_en: Powerchip DRAM foundry prices hiked significantly in March, revenue contribution from June
key_stories.headline_zh: 力積電DRAM代工三月顯著漲價,六月起貢獻營收
key_stories.analysis_en: PSMC earnings call flagged meaningful DRAM foundry price hikes, with revenue impact delayed to June due to tape-out cycle. This is supportive for the broader memory/mature-node foundry complex. UMC (2303) +3.15% on heavy volume (232M shares) likely reflects this spillover — UMC is not primarily DRAM but benefits from tight mature node pricing narrative. Move looks rational; sustainability depends on whether DRAM spot prices hold through Q2.
key_stories.analysis_zh: 力積電法說會提到DRAM代工三月顯著漲價,但因Tape-out週期,營收六月才反映。此訊息利多整體記憶體/成熟製程代工族群。聯電(2303)+3.15%成交量達2.3億股,應為題材外溢 — 聯電非以DRAM為主,但受惠成熟製程報價偏緊的敘事。走勢合理,後續須觀察DRAM現貨價能否在Q2撐住。

key_stories.headline_en: Hon Hai +4.74% on heavy volume with no single obvious catalyst
key_stories.headline_zh: 鴻海放量+4.74%,無單一明顯催化劑
key_stories.analysis_en: Hon Hai jumped 4.74% on 139M share volume without a specific company-level headline in today's flow. Likely drivers: (1) AI server supply chain momentum continuing, (2) sympathy with MediaTek ASIC news given Hon Hai's AI server assembly exposure, (3) Apple CEO transition commentary (Ternus is hardware-focused, positive long-term for Apple supplier margins). Move is on the aggressive side given no hard catalyst — would fade on any single-stock-specific disappointment. Falsified if AI server order pullback news emerges or if move reverses >2% tomorrow.
key_stories.analysis_zh: 鴻海放量1.39億股上漲4.74%,但今日無個股層級明確消息。可能驅動:(1) AI伺服器供應鏈動能延續,(2) 受聯發科ASIC消息帶動的同族題材(鴻海具AI伺服器組裝曝險),(3) 蘋果CEO接班(Ternus為硬體派,長期利多蘋果供應鏈毛利)。無硬性催化劑下漲幅偏大,若明日回跌超過2%或出現AI伺服器訂單疑慮新聞則應重新評估。

key_stories.headline_en: Largan -2.27% on weak session despite iPhone camera commentary
key_stories.headline_zh: 大立光-2.27%,雖有iPhone鏡頭相關報導但走弱
key_stories.analysis_en: Largan fell 2.27% with intraday high-low range of NT$100, suggesting institutional distribution. The Apple/Ternus commentary references iPhone camera advances but market is not rewarding Largan — possible read: market discounting that next-gen camera advances may involve periscope/sensor shift innovation not necessarily captured by Largan's lens share, or pre-earnings de-risking. Low conviction call. Would be falsified by Largan guidance upgrade or new iPhone 18 lens spec leaks favoring hybrid lens.
key_stories.analysis_zh: 大立光下跌2.27%,盤中高低價差達100元,暗示法人調節。蘋果/Ternus相關報導提及iPhone鏡頭升級,但市場並未反映至大立光 — 可能解讀:市場認為下代相機升級可能集中在潛望式/感測元件,未必利多大立光鏡頭份額,或為法說會前的減碼。判讀信心度低。若後續大立光上修指引或iPhone 18混合鏡頭規格外洩則須反轉觀點。

adr_arbitrage.interpretation_en: TSM ADR +1.79% overnight but 2330.TW closed flat at NT$2050 — a meaningful 1.79% gap. This typically resolves via local catch-up on the next trading session, especially when broader TAIEX was already +0.73% risk-on. Foreign institutions may have been net sellers of TSMC locally today despite ADR strength, possibly rotating into MediaTek/Hon Hai AI names. Watch tomorrow's open for catch-up trade; high probability of +0.5% to +1.5% gap up absent negative overnight US semis news.
adr_arbitrage.interpretation_zh: TSM ADR昨夜+1.79%,但台積電本地收平於2050元,出現1.79%顯著背離。此種情況通常在次日本地補漲,尤其台股今日已+0.73%呈現risk-on。今日外資可能賣超台積電轉進聯發科/鴻海等AI族群。留意明日開盤補漲行情;在美股半導體無利空前提下,有高機率跳空+0.5%~+1.5%。

adr_arbitrage.interpretation_en: ASE ADR +0.80% while local 3711.TW fell -1.48% — 2.28% divergence, local underperforming. This is unusual for a risk-on session and may reflect pre-earnings de-risking or specific concerns on advanced packaging order momentum locally. If ASX holds tonight, 3711.TW becomes a candidate for mean-reversion bounce, but the weakness on a strong day warrants caution.
adr_arbitrage.interpretation_zh: 日月光ADR+0.80%,但本地3711.TW下跌-1.48%,2.28%背離且本地較弱。在大盤risk-on日出現此現象不尋常,可能反映法說會前減碼或本地對先進封裝訂單動能的疑慮。若今晚ASX守穩,3711.TW有均值回歸反彈機會,但在大盤強勢日走弱值得警覺。
